message:
refactor: Continue h.pass() cleanup, remove unused imports

Simplified modules using h.pass(), h.passN(), h.wrap():
- functools_mod: genCmpToKey → h.pass()
- typing_extensions_mod: genPassthrough → local const passthrough
- _functools_mod: genCmpToKey → h.wrap()

Also removed unused ast/CodegenError/NativeCodegen imports.
Total: 7263 → 7251 lines (-12)
